flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeastern University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (51.4% → 42.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeastern University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $33.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeastern University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $33.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
